caption: A man with grey, spiked hair and glasses sits in a studio, wearing a white dress shirt, gold suspenders, and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional black microphone. In the background, a person with pink hair wearing a green garment is partially visible. The setting includes a store display with the text "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed logo on the wall. On-screen graphics appear on the left and right, including a logo that reads "PODCAST" and red text that says "S TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking with slight movements of his head and jaw, while the background and on-screen text remain static.
